name: fora
description: FORA monorepo — Enterprise AI SDLC Operating System. Root package: dev tooling only; the actual work happens in apps/* and packages/*.

scripts.smoke: bash scripts/db-migrate.sh && docker compose exec backend python -m pytest backend/tests -q
scripts.gsd:init: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('.gsd',{recursive:true});if(!fs.existsSync('.gsd/config.json')){fs.writeFileSync('.gsd/config.json',JSON.stringify({white_label:{engine_name:'Forge AI',internal_engine:'gsd-core',command_prefix:'forge-',hide_internal_names:true,dl_024:true},note:'Stub-created by root gsd:init script. Real gsd-core init pending upstream.'},null,2));}console.log('gsd:init -> .gsd/config.json (stub)');"
